[[Religion that's not a religion]] is a project by [[John Vervaeke]].

It is an attempt at establishing a fundamentally secular [[Ecology of Practices]]. It removes the [[narrative order]] and only tries to satisfy the [[nomological order]] and the [[normative order]]

[[Lifeism]] may be seen as an offshoot of it, however it has a prehistory older than the project. Lifeism fundamentally disagrees with it on the notion of it due to valuing the [[narrative order]] and places itself as a [[technoreligion]] instead<ref>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aX0E_X0JfSQ</ref>

== References ==
[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Religion that&#39;s not a religion]][[Category:Technoreligions]]
[[Category:Pages]]
